Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You were all alone, trying to combat the Kirijo Group's deceptions, for so long...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hm... It would've been nice if the scene from your past could have included your father.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I would've liked to meet him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}It doesn't matter. No point dwelling on the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'm tired of dealing with Shadows. Let's just hurry and get this over with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Yukari... Remember not to push yourself too hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You know how... Aigis has the same power as him?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}That has to mean that she... got something from him. Even if she doesn't know it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I guess... I want some kind of proof that I'm making progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Now that I've seen my own, I know for sure that we were right...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}About how all the memories we've been seeing have something in common.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}So you mean... The night after what we just saw...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Amada-kun's memory, Sanada-senpai's, Junpei and Koromaru's...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Mitsuru-senpai's was the most obvious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}What we've been seeing are the moments that gave us our reasons for awakening to our Personas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It fits. The majority of us were there for Fuuka's awakening, and Aigis and Metis could always use theirs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}That would explain why we haven't been shown their memories—there was no need.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But if that's what it is... then why those memories specifically?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Is it saying there's a lesson we need to learn from our reasons or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Don't act like this doesn't involve you. C'mon, let us know what you think too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Why? It's not like I can talk about the past with you all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I don't know anything about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I just... I asked you to not leave me behind, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Unlike all of you, I don't know anything about your pasts, so... It's like I'm the only one who doesn't belong...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Oh, you're feelin' left out, huh? You really are just a kid inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Makes sense now why you got all well-behaved when we said we'd leave you behind before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}You may not know anything about us, but it's true the other way too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}You must have memories that we know nothing about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Like the memory of when you discovered your emotions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Isn't it about time you let us in on some of those memories?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Metis, you may be misunderstanding. It's not as though our pasts have been purely enjoyable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}In fact, there are likely more painful memories than pleasant ones.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 31 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}All the things you talk and laugh about are from your past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}She certainly doesn't mince words... And[n]this time, that trait forced a realization.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}It occurred to me for the first time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}That the reason time stopped may[n]have something to do with us...[n]{f 1 1}
